name: Windscribe

pricing.details: Free tier includes 10GB/month. Pro plan $9/month or $69/year. Custom plan available per server location.

description: Canadian VPN provider offering a generous free tier, open-source clients, and a self-described "firewall" feature for blocking connections outside the VPN tunnel.
rationale: Windscribe's free tier is among the most capable available, requiring only an email address or none at all for limited functionality. Client applications are open source. The service has not undergone a published independent audit, which is a meaningful gap relative to top-tier providers. Canadian jurisdiction is less favorable than Swiss or Gibraltarian incorporation for some use cases.
